title: Snowflake Schema Structure
description: A visual representation of a snowflake schema, showing a central fact table connected to normalized dimension tables, which are further normalized into sub-dimension tables.
relationships: Fact_Sales connects to Dim_Customer, Dim_Product, and Dim_Date via foreign keys
Dim_Customer connects to and normalizes into Dim_Geography
Dim_Product connects to and normalizes into Dim_Product_Category
